text: Jab unhone kaha ki shehar aakar main badal gayi hoon, toh mera dimaag sunn ho gaya aur bas rona nikal pada, ab bache ke school rejection ki baat kaise karun? Mere andar bas ek hulchul si machi hai aur lag raha hai jaise sab khatam ho gaya, mujhe samajh hi nahi aa raha ki main kya bolun ya kya sochun. Bas unki woh baat kaante ki tarah chubhi ja rahi hai aur main bas siskiyan liye ja rahi hoon.

Uski baat sunkar mere hosh udd gaye aur main bas deewar ko takti reh gayi, abhi toh bache ki disability aur community exclusion ka bojh hi nahi sambhal raha tha. Hospital ka kharcha aur 'log kya kahenge' wale darr ke beech ye naya taana sunkar mera dum ghutne laga hai. Abhi mujhse koi solution mat pucho, mera dil itna bhara hua hai ki bas cheekh kar rone ka mann kar raha hai.

Unke 'badal gayi ho' bolte hi main bilakh uthi aur purani sari baatein dimaag mein bheed lagakar aa gayi jahan mujhe hi bache ki bimari ke liye blame kiya gaya tha. Akeli maa hone ka stigma aur upar se ye naya zakhm—mujhe toh lag raha hai main pagal ho jaungi. Abhi main financial precarity ya treatment nahi soch sakti, bas ye rona ruk hi nahi raha.

Jab usne shehar ki hawa lagne ki baat ki, toh mera dil baith gaya aur main bas zameen par dher ho gayi. Divorcee hone ki wajah se waise hi sab mujhe bache ki disability ke liye manhoos samajhte hain aur ab unki ye baatein sunkar mera poora sharir thanda pad gaya hai. Main abhi kuch nahi kar sakti, bas ek ajeeb si ghabrahat ho rahi hai aur dimaag blank ho gaya hai.

Unki baat sunkar meri toh aatma kaanp gayi, jaise kisi ne meri koshishon aur akelepan ka mazaak udaya ho. Main bache ki wellbeing ke liye din bhar bhaag-daur karke thak chuki hoon, par ab rone ke alawa kuch sujh nahi raha ki rejection kaise jhelun. Abhi mujhse mat pucho aage kya hoga, mera dimaag itna bhara hai ki main bas dher ho gayi hoon.
